baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Refactor this React component API that has several boolean mode props.
evals.expected_output: A composition-based API using explicit variants, compound components, or providers where appropriate instead of boolean prop sprawl.
assertions: Proposes or implements a composition pattern.
